========================================================================
SWEEP domain=workforce slug=drb_72_ai_labor
Question: Please write a literature review on the restructuring impact of Artificial Intelligence (AI) on the labor market. Focus on how AI, as a key driver of the Fourth Industrial Revolution, is causing significant disruptions and affecting various industries. Ensure the review only cites high-quality, English-language journal articles.
Budget cap: $25.0000
